justification: The diff successfully migrates javax to jakarta namespaces and updates Spring/Hibernate versions, but sets java.version to 17 instead of 21, missing the target. It adds @Serial annotations and uses modern Spring Security DSL, but retains deprecated patterns like new Integer/Long constructors (though fixed in some places) and doesn't fully leverage Java 21 features. The diff is coherent with minimal churn, but the incomplete Java version upgrade and lack of Java 21 idioms limit the score.
